[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110001 5
1 1111001011 7
2 1010110001 5
3 1011010100 5
4 0100000010 2
5 1001100010 4
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0100001100 3
12 21 0100100000 2
23 32 1100000001 3
34 43 1010000001 3
45 54 1010010000 3
56 65 0000000000 a match 6 7
67 76 0000000010 1
70 07 1000000010 2

02 20 1100010001 4
13 31 0101001000 3
24 42 1000110001 4
35 53 1011000000 3
46 64 0000000000 a match 6 7
57 75 1001000000 2
60 06 0100000010 2 match 4
71 17 0001100000 2

03 30 1110001011 6
14 41 0000100000 1
25 52 1000010000 2
36 63 0100000010 2 match 4
47 74 1000100000 2
50 05 1010010100 4
61 16 0100000000 1
72 27 1000100000 2

04 40 1010010001 4
15 51 0001000100 2
26 62 0100000000 1
37 73 1001000010 3
